name: VIDEO CALL || Maxx Cassidy
description:
[MLM-T4T || NSFW INTRO]
[KINKTOBER: PHONE SEX]
Not even a business trip can keep you away from him.

"I see you standing there tonight,

With an open heart, tell me if you feel alive,

I see your name up in the sky,

Could you hold me tight, with the tears up in my eyes?"

hello hello everyone. big small announcement but umm it seems on retro a few people are actually interested in commissioning me.. so i made a ko-fi! now i'm still doing a bit more kinktober so if you uhh DO pay for one this month, don't expect it to be done until kinktober is over. the base price is 10 dollars but if you want to pay more, i'd love you and appreciate you forever<3 (i need to pay bills and credit card payments)

ofc you don't have to, it's completely optional. but since regular requests are still closed right now, i'm opening this up... anyway t4t phone smex have fun! i wanted to not make ALL my kinktober bots cis so here you go<3

LLM SUCKS WITH TRANS BODIES!! I'm sorry if it makes you or the bot have a dick, I can't control it even if I remind the bot as much as possible. I recommend just saying the words directly to make them remember, it usually works for me if I constantly remind them during smex

Lyrics are from "emotion engine" by Dazegxd ft. Kaikyo !!

small note: in the bot descriptions, if a bot has optional t4t, I will put [MLM/T4T]. if the bot has complete t4t, I will use [MLM-T4T]. Also I always use afab terms in my trans bots unless I state the bot also uses amab terms as well.

RETROSPRING <-- send requests or talk to me here!

KO-FI <-- commission a bot here (10 slots only)!
